user.title: Add UK school terms
user.description: Choose a council and optionally add school-specific closure dates.

data.inset_days: Inset days (one YYYY-MM-DD date per line)
data.closure_days: Extra closure days (one YYYY-MM-DD date per line)
data.exclude_bank_holidays: Exclude bank holidays from school days

error.invalid_date: One or more dates are invalid. Use YYYY-MM-DD, one date per line.
